calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Continued
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
BELINDA Y. LIU, FOR RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF SONIA TRUDEAU AND ERIC THOMAS, WHO ARE ALSO PRESENT, WITH WITNESS JUDE MELONCON.
APPELLANT'S/DEFENDANT'S REGINALD JONES AND CAROL MCRAE-JONES ARE PRESENT, WITH WITNESS MARIA ALLEN.

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESSES ARE SWORN.

ERIC THOMAS, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HIS OWN BEHALF. SONIA TRUDEAU, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HER OWN BEHALF. WITNESS, JUDE MELONCON, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF RESPONDENT'S/PLAINTIFF'S SONIA TRUDEAU AND ERIC THOMAS.
THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:
EXHIBIT 1 - TWO-PAGE STAPLED COPY OF A LETTER
EXHIBIT 2 - TWO-PAGED STAPLED COPY OF ITEMIZED SECURITY DEPOSIT-DEDUCTION LIST
EXHIBIT 3 - TWO PAGES OF COLOR PHOTOS OF REFRIGERATOR
EXHIBIT 4 - ONE COPY OF PROPOSAL OF ITEMIZED REPAIRS WITH COST INVOICE
EXHIBIT 5 - LETTER FROM S.F. HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXHIBIT 6 - ONE PAGE COLOR PHOTO OF FLOOR
EXHIBIT 7 - FIVE-PAGE PHOTOCOPY OF RECEIPTS FROM LOWE'S
EXHIBIT 8 - COLOR PHOTO OF TOILET
EXHIBIT 9 - THREE PAGES OF TEXT MESSAGING AND ONE LETTER FROM S.F. HOUSING AUTHORITY

REGINALD JONES AND CAROL MCRAE-JONES, APPELLANT'S/DEFENDANT'S TESTIFY ON THEIR OWN BEHALF.
WITNESS, MARIA ALLEN, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF APPELLANT'S/DEFENDANT'S REGINALD AND CAROL MCRAE-JONES. THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:
EXHIBIT A - TABBED PLASTIC BINDER CONTAINING VARIOUS COLOR PHOTOS, WRITTEN DOCUMENTS AND COURT FILINGS
EXHIBIT B - TABBED HARD PLASTIC BINDER CONTAINING VARIOUS COLOR PHOTOS AND WRITTEN DOCUMENTS

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK G. FELICIANO, NOT REPORTED (525)
